summary: Iteration 2 verification for GuionViral (Expo + FastAPI + MongoDB). Backend: 11/11 pytest tests pass. Verified the ffmpeg regression fix: /api/generate-upload with a real MP4 (generated via imageio_ffmpeg from testsrc lavfi filter) returns 200 with source_type='upload', frames_used>=1, non-empty script_generado, thumbnail data-uri, and no _id leak. /api/generate (YouTube link) returns 200 (thumbnail fallback used in sandbox). NEW /api/tts test: {text, voice:'nova'} returns 200 with valid MP3 (base64 decodes to >500 bytes and starts with 'ID3' or MPEG frame sync 0xFF), mime 'audio/mpeg'. save-text success + 400 on empty, history list is desc-ordered and has no _id, DELETE existing returns deleted:true and subsequent GET returns 404, DELETE nonexistent returns 404. Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): NEW clear-button feature works — after generating a text-mode result (result-card visible), pressing header 'clear-button' removes result-card and empties text-input (screenshot confirms). Regression: voice-button opens 'Voz de lectura' modal, download-audio-button renders inside result-card. Only console warning present is a dependency-level 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' (not blocking).
action_items: OPTIONAL/TYPING (carried over from iteration_1): Update ScriptItem.source_type in /app/frontend/src/api.ts to include 'upload' — backend returns source_type='upload' for /api/generate-upload.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: ffmpeg dependency now provided by imageio_ffmpeg (pip) and referenced through FFMPEG_BIN — resolves the container-restart regression. yt_dlp is also configured with ffmpeg_location=FFMPEG_BIN.
server.py _extract_frames uses a single ffmpeg pass (fps=1/2, MAX_FRAMES=6) with a first-frame fallback for short videos — matches the 4-second sample used in tests (yields 1-2 frames).
server.py: no _id leaking (all history reads project {'_id':0}); async I/O via motor + asyncio.to_thread for CPU/blocking ops.
TTS endpoint: chunks long text, validates voice against OpenAITextToSpeech.VOICES, returns 400 on empty text, 502 on synthesis failure.
Frontend (tabs)/index.tsx: header includes testID='clear-button' with resetAll() clearing url/text/description/style/video/result — verified end-to-end.
All UI uses RN components + StyleSheet.create; EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from env; testIDs on all interactive elements.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_guionviral_api.py (added TestTTS class + switched sample-mp4 fixture to imageio_ffmpeg; removed hardcoded BASE_URL default)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of exercised flows (clear-button clears text + result, voice modal opens, download-audio-button visible, mode switch, text-mode /api/save-text integration)

seed_data_creation: Sample MP4 at /tmp/sample.mp4 regenerated on demand via imageio_ffmpeg. Session-scoped teardown deletes items with 'TEST_' prefix from history. One 'TEST_clear button verification GuionViral.' item was created during the UI test via /api/save-text; it will be visible in History until cleaned up (safe to ignore or delete).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend + all requested features verified. Test file uses env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL only. Run tests with: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=<public url> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_guionviral_api.py -v. Frontend testIDs relevant to this feature set: clear-button, voice-button, download-audio-button, result-card, result-text, text-input, mode-text, process-button.
rca_of_issue: Previous regression RCA (verified fixed): apt-installed ffmpeg was not persistent across container rebuilds; /api/generate-upload returned 502 because subprocess couldn't find 'ffmpeg'. Fix in server.py imports imageio_ffmpeg and uses FFMPEG_BIN=imageio_ffmpeg.get_ffmpeg_exe() (pip-installed, persistent). _extract_frames was also simplified to a single ffmpeg pass without ffprobe, with a first-frame fallback for short videos. Verified: upload of a 4-second testsrc MP4 returns 200 with frames_used>=1 and a Gemini-generated Spanish script.
